ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey (e.g., Uganda 2018-19) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., MIS, Standard DHS, Standard AIS) */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the survey (e.g., DHS-VII, DHS-VI) */,
  "recode" TEXT /* Recode version of the survey (e.g., DHS-VII, DHS-VI) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_recode FOREIGN KEY ("recode") REFERENCES recode_versions ("recode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES survey_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_phase FOREIGN KEY ("phase") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recode_versions" (
  "recode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recode version */,
  "recode_name" TEXT /* Name of the recode version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recode version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., GPS, HIV/Other Biomarkers, SPA) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the dataset (e.g., Data Available, Not Collected) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the dataset was updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_dataset_type FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_type") REFERENCES dataset_types ("dataset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "dataset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "dataset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarkers" (
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomarker */,
  "biomarker_name" TEXT /* Name of the biomarker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biomarker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomarker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_biomarkers" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biomarker */,
  "collected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the biomarker was collected in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "biomarker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
